title: Megaroidandmegasitelocator
description: MegaLocator is a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that adds a special compass-style item capable of locating specific world structures. Instead of searching manually, players can use the MegaLocator to detect and track Megaroid and mega-site structures
body:
MegaLocator is a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that adds a special compass-style item capable of locating specific world structures. Instead of searching manually, players can use the MegaLocator to detect and track targeted structures and obtain their location show players the distance so you can track and enjoy 

how to use 
hold in hand and right clik once for megaroid and twice for megasite thats it very user-friendly   if any queries contact gsai4080@gmail.com
